parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'retrospective-analyzer', projectId: $json.projectId, runId: $json.runId, result: { metrics: $json.metrics, analysis: $json.analysis, lessons: $json.lessons }, completedAt: $json.completedAt }) }}
